title: D&D 2024 Armor and Shields
description: Schema for data/equipment/armor.json. Top-level keys are armor names; values describe stats. The file mixes body armor entries (Light/Medium/Heavy) with the Shield entry; shields use ac_bonus while body armor uses ac_base / ac_formula / strength_requirement. Both ac_base and ac_bonus are optional at the schema level so a single shape covers both.
